name: A Pie Crust to Remember
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and salt.
2. Cut in shortening thoroughly with pastry blender.
3. Add ice water and blend until dough cleans bowl and is no longer sticky.
4. Divide into 2 balls.
5. Roll out on floured board, sprinkle a little flour on top of dough to make rolling easier.
6. Roll from center outward.
This amount makes enough for a double crust to fit a 9-inch pan.
